message:
test(proptest): update regression seeds and runtime_compat test harness

Proptest regression seed maintenance:
- Remove proptest_accounts.proptest-regressions: these seeds were
  tied to a previous version of the account property tests and are
  no longer valid after the recent Account model refactors
- Add new regression seed to proptest_adaptive_radix_tree for the
  duplicate-key prefix-search fix (ft-1pz0n), ensuring the ART
  no longer produces duplicate results on prefix queries

Runtime compatibility test updates:
- Update proptest_runtime_compat.rs to align test harness with the
  runtime_compat migration (ft-1bznu), adjusting spawn/async
  patterns to use the new harness macros where applicable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +0,0 @@
-# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
-# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
-# novel cases are generated.
-#
-# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
-# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
-cc c4deeb63a052aad5562af34576d06572c3d204d482fa3bb3263812203b01c1cf # shrinks to accounts = [AccountRecord { id: 0, account_id: "_", service: "a", name: None, percent_remaining: 0.0, reset_at: None, tokens_used: None, tokens_remaining: None, tokens_limit: None, last_refreshed_at: 1000000013, last_used_at: Some(563601042865), created_at: 1603187447306, updated_at: 800002150857 }, AccountRecord { id: 0, account_id: "_", service: "mA-n-F_na_3_3", name: Some("mhO"), percent_remaining: 98.52, reset_at: None, tokens_used: None, tokens_remaining: Some(339780), tokens_limit: None, last_refreshed_at: 1113354435609, last_used_at: None, created_at: 586461112711, updated_at: 376939174687 }], config = AccountSelectionConfig { threshold_percent: 84.74 }

@@ -7,3 +7,4 @@
 cc b3c1fc05c61a2f0183d84dd26fb28289ea05b04a2765ff87e26808fab884191d # shrinks to n = 49
 cc 54923db13763e087cdd56086b687c09071b086771488ef159fddcfe26007cb81 # shrinks to pairs = [([], 0), ([], 1)]
 cc 9bc0d8b2bbb7754b59e102aef027feff5cbfa4e7ac1e5d583368c43b6f810fb1 # shrinks to pairs = [([0], 0)]
+cc a9f0c2c8d2ed23d8a1652ba4e14c9199ba1ba3a0cd63534a41d99d34f4ae49e6 # shrinks to pairs = [([0, 1], 0)], prefix = [0]
